makes full return United States after long absence.
This year, three exciting models being offered: Giulia, Spider.
all-new, compact Giulia sports sedan powered standard 276-hp, turbocharged 2.0-liter 4-cylinder engine mated 6-speed manual transmission 8-speed automatic.
Powering high-performance Quadrifoglio version 505-hp, twin-turbocharged 2.9-liter paired with 6-speed manual.
Rear-wheel drive standard, while all-wheel drive optional.
coupe Spider convertible lightweight sport cars that seat two.
Their exterior shells made from lightweight carbon fiber.
They powered standard 237-hp, turbocharged 1.7-liter 4-cylinder mated 6-speed dual-clutch automatic.

European Commission granted DFSA's audit monitoring system 'equivalent status' with European Union Member States.

part DFSA's commitment Corporate Social Responsibility, DFSA staff their families together care packages those need during Ramadan.

Nationals have completed programme since began 2006.

These images represent staff have been employed with DFSA years more, those recruited last year.
Since inception DFSA recruited experienced staff from around globe.
September 2014, DFSA staff numbered 135, representing nationalities.
Regulatory staff have average 9.75 years' regulatory experience.
celebrated years nationhood, DFSA signed with Insurance Authority, completing arrangements with three federal financial regulators.
DFSA staff gathered under Gate farewell Paul Koster.

DFSA also introduced Markets Law.

review conducted 2009 found robust Enforcement Framework with some minor recommendations enhance effectiveness.

Pages including About DFSA, Doing Business with DFSA, Tomorrow's Regulatory Leaders,Islamic Finance, Legal Framework were made available language region, meeting needs local stakeholders broadening dialogue with broader market.
Since then, most DFSA publications also produced Arabic English.
DFSA's Communications team produced in-house magazine, 13th Story, since 2007, sharing news, views, personal stories even recipes.
13th Story, retitled CONNECT, fostered greater sense family among DFSA community given voice anyone wanting communicate experience, opinion good cause.

2008, DFSA workforce comprised National staff almost 100% increase from just under 2005 prior launch Programme.
2009 proved challenging year regulators across globe.
DFSA, fifth year, calmly navigated choppy waters, working closely with fellow supervisors firms.

also reached employees first time.

DFSA's securities regulation received highly positive assessment following visit expert team from International Monetary Fund World Bank under their Financial Sector Assessment Programme.
June 2007, Abdullah Saleh appointed Chairman DFSA, succeeding Habib Mulla.
November 2007, DFSA "Best Regulator Islamic Funds" award during Annual Islamic Funds World Conference, recognising DFSA's efforts facilitate cross-border marketing Islamic investment funds.
September 2005, DFSA authorised Dubai International Financial Exchange (now NASDAQ Dubai).
Cooperation with fellow regulators supervisors would abiding goal.
